name: ai-elements
description: Create new AI chat interface components for the ai-elements library following established composable patterns, shadcn/ui integration, and Vercel AI SDK conventions. Use when creating new components in packages/elements/src or when the user asks to add a new component to ai-elements.
capabilities: Create AI chat message components with text, images, and tool outputs
Build conversation containers with typing indicators and streaming support
Add file attachments and multi-media content to chat interfaces
Implement voice input controls and audio playback components
Create code blocks with syntax highlighting and copy functionality
Add loading states, shimmers, and progressive reveal animations
author: vercel
securitySummary: This is a legitimate Vercel AI Elements UI component library. Static scanner flagged many findings that are false positives: markdown documentation uses backticks for code examples (not Ruby execution), and example components contain base64-encoded images which trigger C2/encryption false positives. All network access is for CDN resources. No actual security risks identified.
valueStatement: Create modern AI chat interface components using pre-built, composable UI elements that follow shadcn/ui patterns and Vercel AI SDK conventions.
limitations: Requires Node.js 18+, Next.js project with AI SDK installed
Must have shadcn/ui already configured in the project
Components are designed for React/Next.js only
Does not provide backend AI processing - only UI components

useCases.title: Build AI Chat Applications
useCases.description: Quickly scaffold complete AI chat interfaces with message bubbles, attachments, and streaming responses using pre-built components.

useCases.targetUser: DevTools developers creating AI coding assistants
useCases.title: Create Developer Tools
useCases.description: Add code execution displays, terminal outputs, and tool result panels to create IDE-like AI coding assistants.

useCases.targetUser: Full-stack developers building multimodal AI apps
useCases.title: Add Voice and Media Support
useCases.description: Integrate speech input, audio playback, and multi-media message handling into conversational AI interfaces.

promptTemplates.title: Add Message Component
promptTemplates.prompt: Add a message component to my chat interface using ai-elements. I need user and assistant message styles with text content support.

promptTemplates.title: Create File Attachment Handler
promptTemplates.prompt: Add file attachment support to the chat using ai-elements attachments component. Support images and documents with preview thumbnails.

promptTemplates.title: Add Streaming Response UI
promptTemplates.prompt: Add streaming response display to my AI chat using ai-elements. Include typing indicator and progressive text rendering.

promptTemplates.title: Create Code Block Display
promptTemplates.prompt: Add a code block component with syntax highlighting using ai-elements. Include copy button and language label.

bestPractices: Use the component composition pattern - import subcomponents like MessageContent separately to control rendering granularity
Customize through the className prop rather than modifying source files - makes updating to newer versions easier
Use the AI SDK useChat hook for message state management - components are designed to work with it out of the box
antiPatterns: Modifying source component files directly - breaks upgrade path and makes updates difficult
Using components without AI SDK integration - designed to work with useChat hook for full functionality
Ignoring the shadcn/ui dependency - components require Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui configuration

faq.question: What is AI Elements?
faq.answer: AI Elements is a component library built on top of shadcn/ui that provides pre-built React components for building AI-native chat applications. It includes messages, conversations, attachments, and more.

faq.question: Do I need shadcn/ui to use AI Elements?
faq.answer: Yes, AI Elements requires shadcn/ui to be installed in your project. The components are designed as additions to shadcn/ui and use its styling system.

faq.question: Which AI frameworks work with AI Elements?
faq.answer: AI Elements is designed primarily for use with Vercel AI SDK, but can work with any AI provider. The components are framework-agnostic React components.

faq.question: Can I customize the component styles?
faq.answer: Yes, all components accept className props and extend HTML attributes, so you can override styles using Tailwind CSS or add custom styles.

faq.question: How do I add components to my project?
faq.answer: Use the AI Elements CLI: npx ai-elements@latest add <component-name>. This downloads the component code to your components folder.

faq.question: Does AI Elements support streaming responses?
faq.answer: Yes, components include built-in support for streaming. The ChainOfThought component can display reasoning steps as they generate in real-time.
